property.name: eventInstanceId
property.label: Event Instance ID
property.description: Hardcode a specific instance ID to skip the calendar and always show registration.

property.name: registrationId
property.label: Registration ID
property.description: Encrypted registration ID to resume an existing registration.

property.name: hideAudienceDropdown
property.label: Hide Audience Dropdown
property.description: Set to true to hide the audience filter dropdown on the calendar view.

property.name: audienceDropdownLabel
property.label: Audience Dropdown Label
property.description: Label displayed above the audience dropdown.
property.default: Select who you are to see events curated for you

property.name: defaultAudience
property.label: Default Audience Filter
property.description: Pre-filter calendar to this audience (comma-separated for multiple).

property.name: recordType
property.label: Record Type Filter
property.description: Only show events of this Summit Events record type name.

property.name: hideClosed
property.label: Hide Closed Events
property.description: Hide events that have reached capacity.
